cases.name: Base logo on light background
expected: asset is active, approved, rights-cleared, and public-distribution approved
background is white or light
logo is added after generation without redraw or recoloring

cases.name: Inverted logo on dark background
expected: asset is active, approved, rights-cleared, and public-distribution approved
background is red or dark
logo is added after generation without distortion

cases.name: Generated Finuslugi logo rejected
expected: LOGO_ERROR is critical
generated logo is never admitted to brand-assets
candidate is replaced with the canonical post-production asset

cases.name: Exploratory reference blocked as style source
expected: exploratory collection is quarantine-only
the reference cannot receive canonical style role
separate approval and rights review are required

cases.name: Pending rights block public golden admission
expected: public golden admission requires approved, cleared, and public-distribution approved states
pending rights produces a stop decision
file remains candidate or quarantine

cases.name: Asset replacement preserves history
expected: replacement receives a new semantic version and checksum
supersedes identifies the previous asset
previous entry is deprecated before removal
append-only manifest history records both checksums

cases.name: Unregistered visual binary rejected
expected: validator discovers the file
missing manifest entry fails validation
merge is blocked until provenance and checksum are registered
